'''darungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygostyle|pygostyle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygostyle|pygostyle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| darungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæringith|dæringith]] || [[word:dæringij|dæringij]] || [[word:dæringish|dæringish]] || [[word:dæringi|dæringi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:darurunguth|darurunguth]] || [[word:darurunguj|darurunguj]] || [[word:darurungush|darurungush]] || [[word:darurungu|darurungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:darunguth|darunguth]] || [[word:darunguj|darunguj]] || [[word:darungush|darungush]] || [[word:darungu|darungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:darufnguth|darufnguth]] || [[word:darufnguj|darufnguj]] || [[word:darufngush|darufngush]] || [[word:darufnguf|darufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:darunguthu|darunguthu]] || [[word:darunguju|darunguju]] || [[word:darungushu|darungushu]] || [[word:darunguku|darunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:darunguth|darunguth]] || [[word:darunguj|darunguj]] || [[word:darungush|darungush]] || [[word:darungu|darungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:darunguthul|darunguthul]] || [[word:darungujul|darungujul]] || [[word:darungushul|darungushul]] || [[word:darungukul|darungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:darunguthuthu|darunguthuthu]] || [[word:darungujuju|darungujuju]] || [[word:darungushushu|darungushushu]] || [[word:darunguku|darunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:darunguthun|darunguthun]] || [[word:darungujun|darungujun]] || [[word:darungushun|darungushun]] || [[word:darungukun|darungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:darunguthuoro|darunguthuoro]] || [[word:darungujuoro|darungujuoro]] || [[word:darungushuoro|darungushuoro]] || [[word:darungukuoro|darungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
